entry.title: Re: Trying to connect to an SSL-encrypted SAP ASE 16.0 da...
entry.content:
For how to download the ASE client(SDK) please refer to steps in Note 2310113. 
https://me.sap.com/notes/0002310113 

I don't know much about PowerBuilder, found this from old Sybase documentation, hope it helps:
Chapter 25: Using SSL in PowerBuilder clients

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Session | EMEA | AMER | English
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Have you recently requested provisioning of SAP Cloud ALM? We are thrilled to welcome you aboard! Your journey with #SAP Cloud ALM is about to begin, and we’re here to ensure it is smooth and efficient.

To assist you in this journey, we would like to invite you to one of the below online webinars where we’ll guide you through the setup process and answer any questions you may have.

What to Expect in the Webinar

The SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Webinar has been designed to ensure that you and your team are set up for success. During the session, we will:

  • Demonstrate the initial login procedures to access your SAP Cloud ALM tenant.
  • Provide guidance on the next steps to use the solution effectively.
  • Highlight essential training resources to support you and your team’s learning journey.
  • Answer any questions you may have during the session.

Your Next Steps

To make the most of your SAP Cloud ALM onboarding experience, here’s what you need to do:

  1. Share this information with your key stakeholders.

    • Ensure that IT Admins, Project Leads, and Implementation or Operations Partners responsible for SAP Cloud ALM are informed.
    • Don’t forget to forward the webinar invitation to your project implementation partner for their participation.

  2. Register for the Webinar.
    Register Now

We’re excited to embark on this journey with you! Let’s make the most of SAP Cloud ALM together. See you at the webinar!

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Session | EMEA | AMER | English
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Have you recently requested provisioning of SAP Cloud ALM? We are thrilled to welcome you aboard! Your journey with #SAP Cloud ALM is about to begin, and we’re here to ensure it is smooth and efficient.

To assist you in this journey, we would like to invite you to one of the below online webinars where we’ll guide you through the setup process and answer any questions you may have.

What to Expect in the Webinar

The SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Webinar has been designed to ensure that you and your team are set up for success. During the session, we will:

  • Demonstrate the initial login procedures to access your SAP Cloud ALM tenant.
  • Provide guidance on the next steps to use the solution effectively.
  • Highlight essential training resources to support you and your team’s learning journey.
  • Answer any questions you may have during the session.

Your Next Steps

To make the most of your SAP Cloud ALM onboarding experience, here’s what you need to do:

  1. Share this information with your key stakeholders.

    • Ensure that IT Admins, Project Leads, and Implementation or Operations Partners responsible for SAP Cloud ALM are informed.
    • Don’t forget to forward the webinar invitation to your project implementation partner for their participation.

  2. Register for the Webinar.
    Register Now

We’re excited to embark on this journey with you! Let’s make the most of SAP Cloud ALM together. See you at the webinar!

entry.title: High Memory Usage (75GB+) in Cloud ALM – Request for Data deletion
entry.content:
Hello Support,

Our SAP Cloud ALM tenant is currently over-utilized, with HANA memory consumption exceeding 75 GB. it shows that Real User Monitoring (RUM) is responsible for 70 GB of this total.

Thank you,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: High Memory Usage (75GB+) in Cloud ALM – Request for...
entry.content:
Hello ,


May I ask if you have enabled “Optimize Data Volume”? See the portal guide https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/applicationhelp/hm-optimize-data-volume

And please refer to KBA 3416639 - How to configure the data retention (housekeeping) in SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring


Best regards,
Leo
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Developer Extensibility in SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
entry.content: Hi @JaiSrinivasan , do we need separate S/4HANA user license or developer license to work on developer extensibility? Thanks

entry.title: How we can monitor S4/Hana printer Spool request
entry.content:
Hi Team,

The below issue was happened in our S4  System

system was continuously adding multiple document outputs into the same print request (spool request) for a specific internal device,which is not a real printer—it is used only to generate documents for archiving purposes ,where spool requests after each document were not closed, Instead, it continuously appended new documents to the same spool request which  created large and long-running spool requests deprecating PS1 performance.

How we can monitor this kind of thing using SAP CALM


--- Support Assistant ---
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: How To Setup
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: None of these


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How we can monitor S4/Hana printer Spool request
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Thanks for contacting SAP.

According to internal investigation, the Spool request monitoring is currently not supported in health monitoring.

The available and support content for Health Monitoring can be found here :

https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/health-monitoring/health-mon-content.html

 

You can see similar development request from other customers under SAP Continuous Influence:

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/315049
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/315920

However this has not been planed by the development team.

I will contact the responsible developers and transfer your expectation.

As you know the developers keep discovering new features in Cloud ALM that are released on a bi-weekly basis, you could see "What's new" under  https://help.sap.com/whats-new/0cb91c1ef73b400f881823f8d5fd2dea?locale=en-US

 

Please kindly feel free to let me know when further inquires or concerns regarding this topic.

 

Best Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: As an individual learner, can I do use my GMAIl ID for learning hub subscription purchase?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am interested to do certification on SAP. However being an individual learner , I tried to purchase SAP learning Hub subscription but it failed. 

Could someone confirms the process if they know it?

entry.title: How to resolve issue that SAP Cloud ALM missing Hosts information under health monitoring
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring is not showing the host information.

I have already applied the SAP note DIGITS in the S4D and S4Q environments, but the data has not yet started appearing in ALM.


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

Open SAP Cloud ALM

Operations

Health monitoring

SAP S/4HANA

Select S4D.100, S4Q.400 and S4P.400

Select Hosts




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to resolve issue that SAP Cloud ALM missing Hosts...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

I've logon your S4D system to check details and I found the following two problems:

1. The ST-PI collective Note 3706830 is now with version 1 on this system but the latest version is 3, please kindly implement the latest version as this is also requested under  3634291 

2. currently no necessary roles assigned to background user maintained under 

/SDF/ALM_SETUP, please kindly refer to setup guide 

 https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/sap-s4hana-and-sap-business-suite-7

Then check if the user have the required authorizations assigned on SU01 transaction:

  • Navigate to the "Prerequisites" section of the guide.
  • Select tab "Required Authorizations".
  • Identify the relevant authorizations to the users: for HM, 

    role SAP_SDF_ALM_METRIC_PUSH_HEALTH* is necessary and also other roles are required for data collection to CALM.

Please kindly get back to me when the above two points are fulfilled.

 

Best Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: How to create Custom KPI in SAP ALM Cloud - Business Process Monitoring
entry.content:
When I try to create a custom KPI in SAP ALM Cloud - Business Process Monitoring there is no Service Type available for SAP S/4HANA Cloud


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

Please see attached word document



--- Support Assistant ---
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Troubleshooting


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to create Custom KPI in SAP ALM Cloud - Business...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Thanks for contacting SAP.

Please kindly refer to the following guide: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/applicationhelp/custom-kpis#process-overview

What you face is not an issue or a bug but the feature of Custom KPI now under BPM:

currently only the following four service types are available to choose when create a custom KPI.

Service Type

SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment

 

SAP S/4HANA

 

SAP Business Suite 7

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

 

Please kindly feel free to let me know if you have further inquiries or concerns, I will also help involve the developers when necessary.

 

Thanks and Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Customer cannot check/view a specific SAP Note-the status of the Note is ‘Pilot Release’
entry.content:
Customer cannot check/view a specific SAP Note-the status of the Note is ‘Pilot Release’


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Customer cannot check/view a specific SAP Note-the st...
entry.content:
Only a customer who is added to the Pilot customer list, can view the SAP Pilot Note.

If customer cannot check/view a specific SAP Note and after confirmed with SAP, the SAP Note is Pilot Note and the customer is not on the pilot list, customer needs to report an support case to the component in that SAP Note to inquire about being added to the list.

3364668 - How to select/enter support component manually when creating a case - SAP for Me - SAP for Me

entry.title: How to Move Quality Gate 1 Assessment from one project to another in CALM
entry.content:
Clean Core Quality Gate 1  - it got created in the wrong project

we need to move this under another Project 

kindly assist.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Move Quality Gate 1 Assessment from one projec...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Thanks for your patience.

According to internal investigation, currently there is no direct “move” operation for a Quality Gate.

The usual remedy is to re‑create the gate in the correct project and, if required, de‑activate or tag the gate in the original project so it no longer affects reporting or assessments.

Please kindly follow steps below:

  1. Open the source project where the misplaced Clean Core Quality Gate resides.

  2. Locate the unwanted Clean Core Quality Gate in the Quality Gates view.

  3. Mark the gate as Obsolete (or any custom tag) so it is ignored in reports.

  4. (Optional) Change the gate status to “Not Checked” if it is still Accepted, to prevent it from being used for assessments.

  5. Switch to the correct target project (Implementation > Project and Setup → select the target project).

  6. Create a new Clean Core Quality Gate in the target project.

 Please feel free to let me know when any further inquiries or concerns, I will involve the responsible developers to support you further.

 

 

Best Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Post parked documents
entry.content:
Is there a way to post a parked document while viewing its items, rather than clicking into the details page?

 

SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud  #finance

entry.title: How to open the a transport from a feature in CloudALM
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support,

we are facing problem, when we want to open the transport in cloud ALM. If we open the a transport from a feature, the WEBUi open with a complete wring URL/FQDN.

Coudl you please check, were I can change URL here? The landscape data with urls seems to be correct.

 

Best regards

PERSON_NAME


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

Open transport of a feature



*Note To SAP:
I grant permission to SAP Support to connect to my impacted non-production environments and use these steps to be reproduced, even if these steps lead to changes. My permission remains in place until the issue is resolved unless I give other instructions to SAP Support.

--- Support Assistant ---
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Transport Management System
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: TMS for ABAP
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Quality Assurance

Q: Have you checked the KBA DIGITS already?
A: n.a.
Q: Have you performed a system copy of the QA System and followed SAP Note DIGITS
A: n.a.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to open the a transport from a feature in CloudALM
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Thanks for contacting SAP.

Regarding the issue you face, would you please kindly refer to the blog,
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/first-steps-to-work-with-sap-cloud-alm-deployment-scenario-for-sap-abap/ba-p/13627068

Section 4.2.6 > Navigate to the Transport Organizer for CTS-managed Transports via Transport ID

for the steps that need to be followed.

Before you can start using the navigation to the transport organizer for CTS-managed transports by using the transport id, make sure that you have followed all steps in the following documentation: Configuration of the Transport Organizer Web UI.

 

Please let me know if you still face the same when all above steps and Prerequisites are fulfiled.

 

Best Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: How to resolve issue that Several tile missing in health monitoring for Q40 system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

             we observerd that when we try to monitor our Q40 system, several tiles is missing from monitoring as compare to T40 system.

Missing tile Name :

PERSON_NAME Database

ICM

Gateway

ABAP Resources

ABAP Batch Jobs

ABAP Queue

Operation System

Hosts

Even when i click on ABAP Systems, all other sub-tiles are missing,

Can you please check and advise,

Screenshot attached.

NOTE TO SAP SUPPORT: I give my approval for SAP Support to reproduce the described issue, while connected to my impacted non-production environments, using any steps provided in the description below or provided later, even if the steps result in a change being made, until the issue is closed.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to resolve issue that Several tile missing in hea...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Thanks for contacting SAP.

Would you please kindly confirm if the following collective ST-PI note has been implemented on Q40 to the latest version according to the system ST-PI level?

 

  • SAP Note 3706830  – Collective corrections as of ST-PI 7.40 SP34 and ST-PI 7.58 SP01 for SAP Cloud ALM

  • SAP Note 3639977  – Collective corrections as of ST-PI 7.40 SP32 and ST-PI 7.58 SP00 for SAP Cloud ALM (including SP33)

  • SAP Note 3575903  – Collective corrections as of ST-PI 7.40 SP30 for SAP Cloud ALM (including SP31)

  • SAP Note 3502641  – Collective corrections as of ST-PI 7.40 SP28 for SAP Cloud ALM (including SP29)

If not, kindly implement the note then re-activate the data collection of HM for Q40 then see result.

When issue still, I will need to access to the managed system to check further.

 

Thanks and Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to view Movement Type to Transaction Key mapping...
entry.content:
Hi @byd ,

You can check SSCUI 103898 (Copy of Movement Type). Select an existing movement type and view "Account Grouping", you will find the value strings and transaction keys for the movement type.

Let me know if it works for you, thanks!

Grace

entry.title: Re: making attachment assignment block mandatory in SM_CRM
entry.content:
Hi ,

May I ask if KBA 1817423 can be helpful?

1817423 - How to configure "Specify Status-Dependent Required Fields" in Solution Manage

Best regards,

Leo

entry.title: Re: Data missing in CALM health monitoring
entry.content:
Hi Abubakar S,

 

Thanks for contacting us. May I know if the managed service is an S/4 hana system or any other cloud services?

I will firstly recommend you to re-activate the data collection of this service under Health Monitoring then see result.

When issue still, kindly double check if the service has been connected to Cloud ALM without issue by following:

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/connecting-systems-and-services?table_nkw_cn3_qkb-capability=Health+Monitoring

You could also create a case under component SV-CLM-OP-HM for further support.

 

Best Regards,

Sunny

entry.title: How to Completely Delete an Employee/Worker from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I have read SAP KBA 2702011 - “Deleting Employee and Contingent Worker Data in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition” (2702011 - Deleting Employee and Contingent Worker Data in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition), but I am still unclear about the exact operational steps required to delete an Employee/Worker from the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system, especially from the Manage Workforce app.

Please guide me step by step on how to delete a Worker from the system.

If possible, screenshots or visual illustrations would be greatly appreciated.

 

Thank you for your answer.

QuocDT5

entry.title: Manual status Change the CHARM document
entry.content:
I came across a situation where our TR are already moved but CHARM status has not updated. I tried to use the report CRM CRM_SOCM_SERVICE_REPORT to Manual status Change the CHARM document but no luck. Can you identify any report which can change the CHARM change document without reading the TR data. How to overcome the situation? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Manual status Change the CHARM document
entry.content: No other report to update change document status, need to check why the change document status is not set properly, the last step may update the status via debugging.

entry.title: Agents assistant in s/4 hana
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a lot agents' assistant for Ariba but what agents we have dedicated i S/4 Hana?

I found only one article: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/nexgen-ai-agents-for-sap-s4-hana/ba-p/13983394

but it does not give me any information about technical details or list of all agents for S/4

I try to check also this list: https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/protected/index.html#/ai-catalog/

No resources there. Please help

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: EMail not received from CALM
entry.content:
Hi Shivani,

Thanks for your contact.

There could be multiple reasons why email notification is not received from Cloud ALM.

Such as:

alerts not generated from CALM 

issus with email configuration under Notification Management

...

We need details for troubleshooting.

Do you have alerts triggerred and if the email adress has been maintained under the monitoring type configuration?

You could also create a case under component SV-CLM-INF-NMS or SV-CLM-OP-IEP for further support.

 

Best Regards,

Sunny

entry.title: Is it possible to disable document splitting in 2602
entry.content:
Dear all,

In 2602, document splitting is activated default, but I don't document splitting on profit center wise. Is it possible to disable document splitting in 2602? is there any Note or official document mention this?Thanks

B,R

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/dcb274a8656348e2aad594a1e307b84a.html

The external reference from solution order header should be mapped to the customer reference in the follow-up sales orders. Could you provide more details?

If you have further questions, we can ask experts to follow up. Thanks for your question!

Best Regards,

Wei

entry.title: Re: Is Scope Item 7XY only valid for DE and US?
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes as per release in 2602, 7YX is only available for DE and US.

Regards

Sahil

entry.title: Sales Order BOM Components Not Copied Completely into Production Order
entry.content:
Hello Team,

While checking the production order, we observed that not all Order BOM components are being copied into the production order.

One of the common causes identified is related to Phantom Item components. However, there are also certain cases where the component is marked as a Phantom Item, but its lower-level components are still getting copied and displayed in the production order.

Could you please help review and advise on the reason for this inconsistent behavior?

entry.title: Change currency format in Fiori from Millions to Lakhs
entry.content: We want to see  currency format in Fiori in Lakhs(INR) instead of millions.

entry.title: Couldn't find note 100690 code
entry.content: I initially inquired about Note 100690, and the official response was to run report ZKOGLMNG. However, I couldn't find any ZKOGLMNG code under the note 100690. Could you tell me how to solve this issue?

entry.title: Re: SAP Dynamic Forms (CA-SDF) integrated with sap Ui5/Fi...
entry.content:
Please find below link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/dynamic-forms/installation-guide/high-level-installation-process-for-sap-dynamic-forms

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports runtime application to Crystal Report...
entry.content:
Firstly, you can't simply update the runtime, you must get the developer to update the runtime on their DEV PC and then rebuild the application using the latest CR for VS runtime.

You can then include the MSI packages for deploying.

CR 2025 does not include the .NET runtime, it's a separate download and install now...

See my Blog on how to and the changes that were made:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/upgrading-a-visual-studio-2008-gt-2022-net-project-with-the-latest-cr-net/ba-p/13469215

Go here to get the latest SP 39 EXE to install in VS, the MSI packages do not need to be installed on the DEV PC. Note there is a 32 bit and 64 bit installer, VS 2022 and above is 64 bit.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html?locale=en-US&ai=true

When you preview the report try hitting the refresh button in the viewer, if there is a DB connection issue you'll be prompted which means your connection routine is not working.

OLE dB or ODBC only CR no long supports the SQL Native client.

entry.title: Re: Account Assignment Category Q not available PR item l...
entry.content: Yes it will not be available in Public Cloud as confirmed in SAP note 3016084.  Make use of workarounds as suggested in this SAP note

entry.title: Re: SAP Dynamic Forms (CA-SDF) integrated with sap Ui5/Fi...
entry.content: Thanks but I have already gone through but not found how to integrate the Custom UI5/FIori Application with SAP Build work zone

entry.title: Re: Arrears By Net Due Date different between FBL5H and F...
entry.content:
1) FBL5N (Customer Line Item Display)
This is the classic line item report. It shows open items with fields like Net Due Date, Days in Arrears, etc. The “Arrears by Net Due Date” field here is calculated directly from the baseline date + payment terms. If the item is not overdue, the arrears value will be zero.

2) FBL5H (Customer Balance Display)
This is the hierarchical balance report. It aggregates and categorizes items differently. The “Arrears by Net Due Date” field here is derived from aging logic used in the hierarchical balance display. It can reflect arrears based on net due date buckets rather than the exact open item calculation.
In other words, FBL5H uses different calculation logic (aging by due date categories) compared to FBL5N’s item‑level calculation.

Why you see differences is because, in FBL5N, the arrears field is strictly item‑based. If the open item is not overdue, it shows 0. In FBL5H, the arrears field can show values even if FBL5N shows zero, because it’s aggregating based on net due date buckets and may include items differently depending on the report’s configuration. This is expected behavior and the two reports are designed for different purposes:

  • FBL5N → transactional detail
  • FBL5H → balance overview with aging

What you can do is

  • Check the aging configuration in FBL5H (the buckets defined in the report).
  • Compare the baseline date, payment terms, and due date of the item to see why FBL5H categorizes it differently.
  • If you need consistency, rely on FBL5N for item‑level arrears and use FBL5H only for summarized balance views.

entry.title: Re: About note 100690
entry.content: You should inform SAP that the correction report is missing from the note delivery. The note itself is only a reference, and the executable program ZKOGLMNG is not shipped automatically with the note. SAP’s official guidance is that you must raise an incident with SAP Support and request the correction report directly from them. They will provide the transport or coding as part of the note implementation.

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning – Show ACTUAL and WORKING in Same Table...
entry.content: You can also use styling rule to set version Actual to display only.

entry.title: Re: Cannot delete fields from Z* incompletion procedure (...
entry.content:
Create a SAP case but most likely you will get a response that it is working according to a design or something along these lines. I know that there are places where you cannot make changes even to custom objects after they have been transported to test system.

Perhaps workaround would be creating a new procedure.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Tile created through Manage KPI and Reports not...
entry.content: add: Select Single SAPUI5 Repository Only --> analyticsdts1

entry.title: Re: Automatic Payment Run – Credit Note Not Considered wi...
entry.content: invoice is currently unblocked, still we are getting the same error

entry.title: Re: Manual status Change the CHARM document
entry.content:
Usually when the transport is "ahead" that should not impact setting the status with either the action or the report CRM_SOCM_SERVICE_REPORT. If it doesn't work with this report, then there's probably another problem at the same time (RC=8 on the transport or something completely different).

For tough cases we had a developper write us a Z-report, but for single incidents debugging will also do.
With both approaches, keep in mind that you not only have to set the user Status Exxxx but also the system status Ixxxx to avoid problems further down the road.

entry.title: SAP Bank file issue
entry.content: In Sap Bank file generation, the requirement is to generate Two Spaces at the end of text file header, kindly suggest the feasibility.

entry.title: Onboarding 2.0 – Duplicate Name Scenario / Rehire Verification
entry.content:
Hi all,

This is related to Onboarding 2.0.

We encountered a scenario that we haven’t come across before.

There is an inactive profile in the system with:

  • First Name: ABC
  • Last Name: XYZ

We initiated onboarding for a new external candidate from the Recruitment module who has the same first and last name, but different TFN, DOB, and email address.

During onboarding initiation from RCM, the "Pre-Onboarding Rehire Verification" step was triggered. I selected "Proceed to New Hire".

However, after completing the Personal Data step in Onboarding, the "Onboarding Rehire Verification" step was triggered again.

In Recruit/Rehire Configuration → MatchingUserConfiguration (MATCHINGUSERCONFIG), we have certain matching criteria maintained.

Could you please confirm:

  • Is the rehire verification step being triggered due to the configuration in MATCHINGUSERCONFIG?
  • If so, which specific matching criteria (e.g., First Name / Last Name) is causing this duplicate rehire check?

     

    Thanks,

    Rohini

entry.title: Re: Account Assignment Category Q not available PR item l...
entry.content:
Hello @kishore_kumar29,

as Lakshmipathi  said, Account Assignment Q is not available in S/4 HANA Public Cloud standard.

 

We have achieved the usage by working with two BADIs:

For a scenario a list of predefined conditions is delivered. In case you need to extend this list, you can extend the condition list with additional conditions (BAdI SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF).

In SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL you must evaluate the values of appended conditions. By it you have the control that dependent on your condition process instances will be started or steps will be created.

 

1️⃣   SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF: for Providing additional conditions for scenarios

 

2️⃣   SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL: for Value evaluation of additional conditions for scenarios

 

3️⃣   Manage Workflows for Purchase Requisitions: Result can be seen and set up here

 

Best regards,

Kerisha

entry.title: Re: How do you grant HRBP access to Performance Forms?
entry.content: Hi Chrisww! We give to HRBP's visibility over PM forms via reporting by adding a document ID with a link. This way HRBP's have read rights and report is limited to their target population. I hope this helps. Br, KrE

entry.title: Re: Storing Output Documents in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
@SAPILMGUY : 
From output management side, please refer to the SAP help for SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition -> SAP S/4HANA Output Control -> Setup of SAP S/4HANA Output Control -> Setting up Storage System and Storage Category

In addition, further documentation of SAP document management might be helpful.

entry.title: Re: SSAM 2310 Search in Equipment Hierarchy Extension Control
entry.content: Did you achieve it?if yes please let us know how you did it

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP : Excel upload through custom action popup ( No UI5 Extension , No Object Page workarou
entry.content: I tried to follow same process for upload pdf but my attachment value are shown in  base64 format.

entry.title: "Error in entity 'ZBRAND1_ITEM_PROJ(CDS)': Draft is not supported" while publishing a service in RAP
entry.content:
We are attempting to extend the transactional view R_SourcingProjectTP by adding additional fields via an extension. As part of this, we created a custom projection view and exposed it through a new service. However, during service publishing, we encounter the following error:

Error: "Error in entity 'ZBRAND1_ITEM_PROJ(CDS)': Draft is not supported"

Steps performed:

  1. Extension of Standard Interface View
    • Created an extension on the standard interface view R_SourcingProjectTP, which is draft-enabled.
  2. Behavior Extension
    • Extended the behavior definition for the same interface view.
  3. Child Projection Creation
    • Created a projection view on the child entity R_SourcingProjectItemTP.
  4. Custom Projection View (Parent)
    • Created a custom projection view on top of R_SourcingProjectTP.
    • Added an association to the custom projection of R_SourcingProjectItemTP.
    • Maintained proper redirection to the child entity.
  5. Behavior Projection Definitions
    • For the parent projection:

ABAP

use association _SourcingProjectItem { create; with draft; }

Show more lines

    • For the child projection:

ABAP

define behavior for zitem_projection

{

use update;

use delete;

use association _SourcingProject { with draft; }

}

 

Show more lines

  1. Metadata Extension
    • Extended metadata for both parent and child projection views.
  2. Service Definition
    • Created and exposed both projection views in a service.

Issue

While publishing the service, the activation fails with the error:

"Draft is not supported" for entity ZBRAND1_ITEM_PROJ.

 

We would appreciate any guidance or suggestions on resolving this issue and correctly enabling draft support in this scenario.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Development Tools for VS Code: Everything You Need to Know
entry.content: Could you please tell me when the official version will be available?

entry.title: Enhancement of the Profit Center column in the MB51 report.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

There is an issue related to the enhancement of the Profit Center column in the MB51 report. Currently, the Profit Center field is not available in MB51. This enhancement is required to verify whether the Profit Center is correctly captured in the accounting document entries and to help identify and resolve related discrepancies.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA System Conversion – Custom code adaptation process
entry.content:
Hi Olga,

Another false positive scenario. This one for MATNR.

BAPI_INSPOPER_GETDETAIL is used in a custom application. As per note 2438131 attachment, the BAPI optional table parameter INSPPOINTS has the MATNR field therefore the ATC readiness check error. However in our usage this parameter is not passed/used in the BAPI call but we still get the ATC error.

regards

Nitesh

entry.title: Re: Manual status Change the CHARM document
entry.content:
Hello,

You can try using the transaction analyzer found under Service Operations in CRM_UI SOLMANPRO business role. 

regards,

Luigi Co

entry.title: Re: What's Hybrid Specification Management?
entry.content: Sure, drop me a mail.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Connector, Tomcat related question
entry.content:
Hi Xavier22,

please see https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/installation#portable-version-vs.-installer-version .
And you will find the version info, if you click in the upper right corner of the Administration UI on your user profile --> About.

entry.title: Re: Application Vulnerability Report: Now Scanning Your Applications Beyond EU Landscapes

entry.title: Re: How to Convert from HTML to PDF in SAP CPI - Part I
entry.content: I got Stuck in message mapping stage, can you explain in details how to achieve it

entry.title: Re: Enhancement of the Profit Center column in the MB51 r...
entry.content:
Add MSEG-PRCTR in the Customizing : SPRO -> Material Management -> Inventory Management and Physical Inventory -> Reporting -> Define Field Selection for Material Document List

  • 2488245 - Field missing on output of report MB51 - SAP ERP & SAP S/4 HANA 

NB: If the profit center is correct in FI or CO and not in MM, ask an Abaper to read data from FI/CO using enhancement spot ES_RM07DOCS.

entry.title: Re: Simulate sales order using I_SalesOrderTP
entry.content: Hello, Is there any progress on this matter? Using BO (business object) would be a more accurate process.

entry.title: SAP Community Voice: SAP Sapphire 2026 Special Edition
entry.content:
This week's edition of the SAP Community Voice celebrates one of our most waited and biggest events: SAP Sapphire 2026!  

The event that happened in Orlando and now in Madrid, gave the opportunity for attendees to learn about Joule’s new central workspace, experience live demos and see how Joule proactively improves operations. The highlights for our SAP community was also to connect with experts, partners, and peers to talk about AI strategies and insights about SAP new announcements.  

If you had the chance to be there in person or watch the keynotes virtually, you probably are excited about the new SAP Business AI Platform, which forms the basis for the future of business: the Autonomous Enterprise, where agents run the business and you can focus on what matters.  

And our team believes there’s no better place to start than by investing time in learning. Today, we are excited to share more details about some of the recent announcements that could help you reach the next level.

Check out now:

  • SAP Certification Turns 30 and Expands Its Portfolio for the AI Era:  

A transformed certification approach and new AI-assisted learning capabilities in SAP Learning Hub redefine how SAP professionals build, prove, and maintain their skills as SAP Certification turns 30 in 2026, marking both a milestone and the completion of the most significant transformation in the program's history. Building on the new performance-based assessment approach introduced at SAP TechEd 2025, the full SAP Certification portfolio of more than 100 certifications now moves away from traditional multiple-choice formats to hands-on practical assessments, while candidates can leverage AI tools during exams, mirroring the tools and resources they use every day. This is part of SAP's commitment to equipping 12 million people with AI-ready skills by 2030), building on the more than 4 million people already reached in 2025. 

 

  • Practical Assessments Across the Full Portfolio 

The assessment framework includes role-plays, challenge-based case studies, and practical tasks that mirror actual scenarios professionals encounter in SAP implementations, while system-based exams have Joule for Consultants built in and candidates can use AI support and documentation throughout, mirroring the tools and resources they rely on every day. Each certification includes comprehensive learning journeys and practical exercises, and more than 100,000 certification exams have already been taken under the new model. According to CIO magazine, SAP is among the first major enterprise software vendors to implement this shift at scale.  

Available globally now at https://learning.sap.com/get-certified/reimagining-certification.

 

  • SAP Learning Hub Introduces AI-Assisted Learning Capabilities 

Alongside the certification transformation, SAP Learning Hub, the single destination for customers and partners to learn, practice, and prove their SAP skills, is introducing new AI-assisted capabilities in its customer and partner editions. Already embraced by over 7,500 early users, the new capabilities allow learners to engage with SAP course content beyond traditional linear learning by asking questions and getting instant answers in over 80 languages, with precise citations from SAP's trusted learning content, while additional AI-generated formats include podcasts, interactive sessions with AI hosts, automatically generated FAQs, mind maps, study guides, quizzes, and video overviews. The business impact is measurable: LTIMindtree reported 50 percent faster onboarding, and for Dieter Schoon, Chief People Officer at NTT Data Business Solutions, SAP Learning Hub has become the primary way their talent becomes future-ready in the agentic AI era. 

 Available globally now at https://learning.sap.com/learninghub-subscriptions.

 

  • SAP introduces new learning journey, certification for data architects 

As AI becomes embedded across enterprise operations, the quality of the data it relies on can be a competitive differentiator. SAP is introducing “Becoming a Certified SAP Data Architect,” a new learning journey that includes a certification in SAP Business Data Cloud, designed to help data architects build the data foundation AI requires. The learning journey addresses a key challenge for enterprise AI (data fragmented across disconnected systems) by helping learners develop skills to connect, manage, and govern data across the enterprise using SAP Business Data Cloud, ensuring AI models can access consistent and reliable information while enabling teams to move faster from raw data to business decisions. Data architects who complete the learning journey and earn the certification will be prepared to support a data fabric approach, so data stays coherent and accessible across the enterprise. The learning journey is now available on the SAP Learning site.

 

  • SAP Expands Access to AI-Ready Skills with New Learning Offerings and Accenture Partnership 

As the AI-ready skills gap becomes a defining challenge for organizations worldwide, with the World Economic Forum identifying skills shortages as the primary barrier to business transformation ahead of investment constraints and regulatory complexity, SAP is expanding its learning portfolio with new offerings designed to increase access, relevance, and scalability of AI-ready skills development, supporting its commitment to equip 12 million people with AI-ready skills by 2030 (Read more details here).

 

  • Accenture Becomes First Global Authorized Partner to Deliver SAP Learning Class 

SAP is introducing a partner-led delivery model for SAP Learning Class, its premium instructor-led training offering, with Accenture becoming the first SAP Authorized Education Partner and SAP Global Strategic Services Partner to deliver these courses worldwide. The model combines SAP-authored content and pre-configured SAP training systems with Accenture's global delivery capabilities, industry expertise, and local accessibility across time zones and geographies, while Accenture instructors bring practical insight into how SAP integrates within complete enterprise technology stacks, including SAP's AI capabilities. SAP Learning Class can also be combined with self-paced learning on the SAP Learning site, creating a continuous development path from foundational knowledge to hands-on experience and SAP Certification. 

Available globally now at SAP Training Shop.

 

  • SAP Makes Selected AI Live Sessions Available to All Learners 

SAP is offering free AI-focused live sessions open to everyone, covering Business AI topics across awareness, adoption, and demonstrations: 

  • Accelerate your transformation to the Cloud with SAP Business AI 
  • Efficient Document Inbound Processing in SAP Cloud ERP with SAP Document AI 
  • All Things Business AI: Latest Insights, Updates & Live Demos 
  • Build AI Securely: Avoid Pitfalls in the Development and Operations Lifecycle 

Available now at https://learning.sap.com/artificial-intelligence.

 

  • New Learning Journey for Enterprise Architects Leading AI Transformation 

Enterprise architects play a central role in shaping AI adoption and transformation strategies, yet role-specific training for this audience has been largely absent from the market. The new learning journey, “Leading AI-Driven Transformation as an SAP Enterprise Architect,” addresses this gap by providing frameworks and guidance on aligning AI initiatives with business objectives, assessing organizational readiness, managing architectural risk, and designing scalable, secure enterprise landscapes. 

Available globally from May 2026, free of charge at SAP Learning site.

 

  • Clean Core: Building the Foundation for Innovation and AI Readiness 

A standardized and upgrade-stable SAP S/4HANA core enables organizations to adopt new capabilities more quickly, reduce upgrade cycles from months to days, and free resources for innovation, while also creating the data foundation AI requires through standardized data models and reduced system fragmentation that allow AI solutions to access consistent, enterprise-wide data. The course “Clean Core: Applying Clean Core Principles in SAP S/4HANA” provides guidance on governance, architecture, and cloud-compliant extensions for developers, consultants, and architects responsible for building future-ready SAP environments. 

Available globally now, free of charge 2026 at SAP Learning site 

For more details, please check the SAP Sapphire Innovation News Guide 2026  

SAP Community at SAP Sapphire 2026  

Beyond the amazing news, for our SAP community the event also becomes a wonderful opportunity to get insight from the experts, network with professionals from all over the world, learn more details about all sorts of SAP topics and meet other members. This year we were very proud to have the SAP Mentors and the SAP Champions (@david_ruizb , @Dominik_Tylczynski , @tonjakehrer, @sumikko) in the event. In case you also attended the event in Orlando, Madrid or even virtually, we would like to encourage you to write a blog post telling your opinions, insights and thoughts about the event. You can share the content inside the Technology Blog Post, in the Community Corner, or any other group or topic of your preference (check here the list of all interest groups). The idea is to give you an open space to share what you think about SAP new vision for how business will run from now on.

entry.title: Re: insert only if not exist
entry.content:
@@MarkAParsons,

 I think I found a better way.

 

I check the documentation and there is an "WITH IGNORE_DUP_KEY" option when creating an index.

 

So I just tested it and it works as I would expect. No subquery is needed to verify.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Connector, Tomcat related question
entry.content:
Hi Xavier22,

and to emphasize it here as well, Tomcat is included within the deliverables of Cloud Connector, it is adopted to the needs of Cloud Connector.

Best regards,
Markus

entry.title: Re: Activation of Selective Data Transfer (SDT) app
entry.content: See also https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/transition-to-sap-cloud-alm/selective_data_transfer_to_calm.html

entry.title: Partner Learning Accelerator: SAP Certified – SAP Business Data Cloud Fast-Track Session
entry.content:
SAP Business Data Cloud is moving fast.  Customers are asking bigger questions about data, AI, governance, and modernization.  Partners need answers that connect strategy with execution.

This Partner Learning Accelerator helps you prepare for the SAP Certified – SAP Business Data Cloud exam in a focused 3-hour live session built for experienced SAP Partners.

What you’ll explore:
• SAP BDC architecture and governance
• SAP BW modernization approaches
• SAP Databricks and AI use cases
• Delta sharing scenarios
• Storyflow execution from the SAP BDC cockpit
• Practical certification tips from certified experts

Plus, you’ll hear insights that go beyond the exam content and connect directly to customer conversations.

If SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere are already part of your toolkit, you’re in the right place.

Seats fill quickly.  Register now.  https://partneredge.sap.com/en/library/education/psd/2025/may/e_oe_te_w_PSD_WEB_00010285.html

#SAP #SAPBTP #SAPPartners #SAPEcosystem #SAPDatabricks #AI #SAPBusinessDataCloud #DigitalTransformation

entry.title: Re: Business maintain condition contract BUT do not want...
entry.content: My company is selling laptop product, along with this they also sell ADP(accidental damage protection) of some X insurance company, on the ADP product line they have 30% margin to my company for selling and 70% is paid to Insurance company is managed via conditions in the sales order and invoice. Due to some technical challenges the current process they cannot continue hence Condition contract approach is recommended for the same. Business also agreed for this approach. However, they would like to continue their existing settlement process ( i don't have complete details on this process). Only condition contract should be used to determine the 70% of ADP(list price) into Sales order from Condition contract. NOTE: So far they were not using any rebate or settlement process for their existing payment to the vendor Thanks Sri

entry.title: CSapEditiorCtrl::GetObject: Object 164 does not exist in SAP GUI 800.
entry.content: I encounter the error 'CSapEditiorCtrl::GetObject: Object 164 does not exist' when trying to edit text in Smart Forms while using SAP GUI 800. This issue started after upgrading to SAP GUI 740 Patch 5 or newer. It is caused by the removal of the legacy SAPscript Text Editor controls from the SAP GUI, replaced by the MS Word editor. The error suggests a missing control object issue, likely related to the missing legacy editor controls that are no longer included by default. To resolve this, I need to either reinstall the SAPscript Legacy Text Editor component from SAP or properly configure MS Word as the editor, ensuring the correct settings are applied to avoid this error.

entry.title: Re: Can't find Unit Price in "Create Outgoing Inv...
entry.content:
Hi nancy,

Create outgoing invoices is only a financial customer  invoice without any unit price. If you are selling products then post customer invoice using Sales Order related process.

entry.title: Re: May 2026 Developer Challenge — Week 1: Getting familiar with the events
entry.content:
My submission for week 1:

  1. Broker used: Solace PubSub+ Cloud (Free Tier). I chose it because SAP Advanced Event Mesh is powered by Solace under the hood, making the learning experience identical! 

  2. Event Generator: I used the Business Event Generator web app to successfully simulate and publish the S/4HANA Business Partner events. 

  3. Sample CloudEvent:{"specversion":"1.0","type":"sap.s4.custom.BusinessPartner.Created","source":"/sap/s4/erp/business-partner","id":"4deab3e2-8472-4a89-8da0-885d467d3853","time":"2026-05-20T07:10:58.552Z","datacontenttype":"application/json","subject":"1003787","data":{"BusinessPartner":"1003787","BusinessPartnerUUID":"36f8993d-66ce-4536-829d-cb5f5a41a09b","BusinessPartnerFullName":"Prof. Stjepan Lehmann","BusinessPartnerCategory":"1","BusinessPartnerGrouping":"BP02","FirstName":"Prof.","LastName":"Stjepan","IsNaturalPerson":"X","CreationDate":"/Date(1518393600000)/","CreatedByUser":"CC0000000002","BusinessPartnerAddress":{"Country":"DE","Region":"","CityName":"Wiedenbrück","PostalCode":"14593","StreetName":"Neuschäferweg 8","HouseNumber":"3/7","AddressTimeZone":"CEST"}}}

entry.title: Re: New User Interface - Performance Management | Categor...
entry.content:
Hi @Sreenivasulu20 ,

Thank you for your reply.

Manage Team Targets can be found here:



Thank you and Best Regards,
Joseph

entry.title: Re: Drop documents here. If you drag multiple files, pick...
entry.content:
The message is correct.

You can drop files from your computer into the drop area. For example, on a Windows system, you can drag files from your desktop or from the file explorer and drop them into the drop area of Solution Documentation. When you have dropped files to upload in the drop area, the Upload Documents dialog opens. More details can be found in Drag and Drop of Documents | SAP Help Portal.

If uploading documents fails, you can create a case under the component SV-SMG-IMP for further check.

entry.title: Is it possible to export data as excel but with subtotals, such as in the pivot table format?
entry.content: Trying to export data from SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud into Excel. The issue is that every time we need to add the subtotals and other parameters. Is it possible to export as a pivot table to make analysis much easier and more friendly? The same question has asked in 2024 but still not resolve..........if yes, please update.

entry.title: Permissions are granted, yet SF system is missing when creating support cases
entry.content:
I already have the required permissions, but the SuccessFactors system is still not showing up in the case creation options.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Permissions are granted, yet SF system is missing whe...
entry.content:
To create, view and resolve cases related to this SuccessFactors installation, S-users need both standard case permissions and the Display Cloud Data authorization assigned at the installation number level.
 
Below are some KBAs that will help you understand this topic.

2598170 - What is the Display Cloud Data authorization? - SAP for Me
2193754 - S-user is unable to create or view SuccessFactors support cases - SAP for Me
2607729 - Tips on creating a SuccessFactors support case - SAP for Me 

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please feel free to contact us. 

Best regards,
SAP support

entry.title: Re: S4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD CDS VIEWS for FP&A Planning
entry.content:
Hello @ranguduvv_prasad,

From Datasphere side, if you would like to replicate data from S/4HANA Cloud to Datasphere, the mandator Communication Scenario to use Replication Flow and Data Flow is SAP_COM_0532. For Remote Table feature, you can use SAP_COM_0531 or Custom Communication Scenario. For more information, please refer to the following official documentation:

  • https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/9f804b8efa8043539289f42f372c4862/abb159e027184c98a54fc1b2a88dd3f5.html?locale=en-US&version=LATEST

Best Regards,
Charls

entry.title: Re: Asymmetric Reporting Layout
entry.content: Hi, thanks for the great article! In the screenshot showing the months as columns (Jan, Feb, Mar), the year is not displayed in the month headers. How exactly did you achieve this? Whenever I set up my table, it always shows the full format like 'Jan (2026)'. Is there a specific display option or workaround to hide the year?

entry.title: Re: Permissions are granted, yet SF system is missing whe...
entry.content: Even when permissions are properly granted, the SF system may still not appear while creating support cases due to configuration issues, role hierarchy restrictions, or missing access in the backend setup. It is important to verify system settings, user roles, and integration mappings to ensure smooth case creation and access visibility.https://www.betalifesci.com/pages/immunoglobulins-superfamily

entry.title: Re: Understanding SAP Supply Chain through Production, Procurement and Sales by AI Comics
entry.content: This is so easy to understand, great job. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: CSapEditiorCtrl::GetObject: Object 164 does not exist in SAP GUI 800.
entry.content: SAP GUI 740 has been out of maintenance for a long time. The question has been asked and answered many times in the forum. Anyway, as you answer the question (again), I would suggest that you post an independent answer rather than posting everything in the question.

entry.title: Re: USER EXIT OR BADI FOR AUTOMATIC SERIAL NUMBER CREATIO...
entry.content:
Hi Mahil,

You don't need a BAdI or User Exit for this. If you set procedure PPAU (Serial numbers in PP order) and PPRL (PP order release) to 04 (Automatic) in the serial number profile customizing, serial numbers get automatically created when the production order is saved.

Here's the corresponding SAP Help documentation for On Premise/Private Cloud: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/25a41481f62e469ba0e61015a0d39d20/db0eb753128eb44ce10000000a174cb4.html

BR,
Alex

entry.title: In fiori Navigation panel, selected filters are truncated and not visible
entry.content:
After selecting some data in the filters of the Navigation panel (standard fiori apps), we cannot see the values these are truncated 

 

The filter criteria set are all not directly visible completely: every entry seems truncated to show the "x" within the field. 
It is thus very annoying and especially time consuming (for all Fiori users) to verify if filters have been set correctly.
It would be very much appreciated if there is a possibility to enlarge these icons/tokens somehow

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to disable document splitting in 2602
entry.content:
Hi AIDream,

In S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, document splitting is always active and cannot be deactivated.
However, you can use the Define Document Splitting Characteristics for General Ledger Accounting (ID: 102322) configuration activity to deactivate the profit center as a mandatory splitting characteristic. This means that the profit center is no longer required during posting, meaning it does not have to be entered. As a result, documents can exist in the system where the profit center is not filled.
Nevertheless, the profit center remains an active splitting characteristic. This means that if a profit center is provided, document splitting will still be carried out based on it and values will be inherited accordingly, and a default value will be applied if one is defined.

Best regards,
Verena

entry.title: LIVE SESSIONS on SAP Enterprise Support value maps – Data & AI Content Updates
entry.content:
Targeted guidance and self-service content*, available in the Foundational Success Plan for SAP Enterprise Support and SAP Enterprise Support, cloud editions at no additional cost.

Join this live session to learn more about the SAP Enterprise Support updates including:

  • SAP Datasphere in Business Data Cloud: CQC Deployment Readiness and CQC Solution Optimization
  • SAP HANA Cloud: Expert-guided Implementation Workshop Series
  • SAP Business AI & Joule: Expert-guided Implementation Workshop Series

*Content and services include self-paced learning materials, workshop-style interactive remote sessions and continuous quality check (CQC) remote delivered services. Leverage the SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps to get advice on the appropriate SAP Enterprise Support content and services for your needs: SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps

Link to join:

SAP Community YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3DLlZq39dSs

Knowledge Transfer Sessions in 2025/26: https://events.sap.com/sap-user-groups/en_us/ccoe.html#260609

entry.title: IFRS 18 Compliance: Generating Comparative P&L Reports from SAP Cloud ERP, Private and SAP Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Introduction 

IFRS 18 changes how companies show their financial results by making things clearer and more consistent. It groups income and expenses in a standard way, defines clear totals like operating profit, and requires companies to explain any extra performance measures they use. This helps people better understand and compare how companies are doing. 

One of the toughest challenges with IFRS 18 is reworking past financial results so they match the new reporting format, including shifting items, adjusting, and ensuring everything is presented consistently year over year. 

This blog examines how organizations operating on SAP Cloud ERP & SAP Cloud ERP, Private can effectively and pragmatically meet IFRS 18 comparative profit and loss (P&L) reporting requirements. It focuses on approaches that minimize disruption to existing reporting processes while ensuring compliance, leveraging standard capabilities and targeted enhancements rather than large-scale system overhauls. 

How SAP Cloud ERP, Private and SAP Cloud ERP Support IFRS 18 Classification 

As a first step toward compliance, you need to identify how your current GL account structure aligns with the IFRS 18 categories — Operating, Investing, and Financing. SAP Cloud ERP, Private and SAP Cloud ERP provide two main approaches, based on how much detail is needed. 

  1. GL Account-Level Classification (Financial Statement Version (FSV) / Manage Global Hierarchy) 

If your business can clearly group existing GL accounts into IFRS 18 categories, you can use the following: 

  • Financial Statement Versions (FSV): This lets you create a hierarchy of GL accounts that matches the IFRS 18 structure, including the required subtotals. 
  • Manage Global Hierarchy app: This is another option instead of FSV. It offers more flexibility in creating hierarchies and supports functional areas for IFRS 18 reporting.

This is the easier approach. It works well for organizations where the level of detail in GL accounts is enough to separate operating, investing, and financing activities. 

    2. Transaction-Level Classification using Functional Area 

In some cases, a single GL account may include different types of transactions, such as both operating and investing activities. To handle this, you can use the Functional Area field to classify transactions at the time of posting. This helps assign the correct IFRS 18 category more accurately. 

Note: If your organization is already using the Functional Area field for other purposes (for example, cost of sales reporting), then using it again for IFRS 18 classification could create conflicts. In such situations, you can use another approach. You can create a custom field using Custom Fields  app, where you define your own rules to classify each transaction as operating, investing, or financing. 

SAP provides standard Fiori apps to help generate financial statements that comply with IFRS 18: 

 

Fiori App 

Use Case 

Balance Sheet / Income Statement 

IFRS 18 reporting at the GL account level 

W0161 – Balance Sheet / Income Statement (Multidimensional) 

Reporting that combines GL account and Functional Area 

These apps integrate with Financial Statement Version (FSV) and Global Hierarchy to render IFRS 18-compliant P&L presentations including the required subtotals. 

The Comparative Reporting Challenge 

IFRS 18 will take effect from 1 January 2027, so 2026 will be the year used for comparison. How easy this comparison is will depend on what the organization does during 2026. 

Scenario 1: Steps Taken in 2026 (Proactive Adoption) 

Organizations that have already started recording transactions as per IFRS 18 requirements in 2026—whether using their general ledger (GL), functional areas, or any custom setup—will already have the required data in their system. This means they can easily use the Fiori apps mentioned above to create financial statements that meet compliance requirements, including comparisons with previous periods. 

Scenario 2: No Steps Taken in 2026 (Retrospective Approach from 2027) 

Organizations that have not implemented IFRS 18 classification by 2026 will need to restate the previous year’s financial data for comparison. The way this is done depends on how the organization manages its classifications. 

For organizations using General Ledger (GL) account-based reporting: 

Since changes cannot be made directly in audited financial records, the recommended approach is to: 

  1. Create an Extension Ledger in SAP .
  2. Record IFRS 18 reclassification or adjustment entries in this extension ledger 
  3. Use SAP Fiori apps to generate the comparative Profit & Loss (P&L) statement from the extension ledger 

This approach keeps the original audited financial records unchanged while allowing the organization to present financial statements that comply with IFRS 18 for comparison purposes. 

Summary: Decision Tree for IFRS 18 Comparative Reporting 

Are your existing GL accounts sufficient to classify into Operating / Investing / Financing? 

1.) YES → Use FSV or Manage Global Hierarchy 

         i) Report via Balance Sheet/Income Statement Fiori app for SAP Cloud ERP, Private 

         ii) Financial Statement Review Booklet in SAP Cloud ERP 

2.) NO  → Do you use Functional Area for other purposes? 

           i.) NO  → Activate Functional Area for IFRS 18 derivation 

               a.)  Report via W0161 Multidimensional Fiori app in SAP Cloud ERP, Private 

               b.) Financial Statement Review Booklet in SAP Cloud ERP 

          ii.). YES → Create Custom Dimension with derivation rules 

               a.)  Report via Fiori App.

For Comparative Year (2026) — data not captured in 2026? 

→ Create Extension Ledger → Post adjustments → Report from Extension Ledger 

Key SAP References 

SAP Note 3696338 — Advisory Note on IFRS 18 Transition in S/4HANA Private Cloud / S/4HANA 

SAP Note 3694359 - How to Adopt IFRS 18 for Financial Reporting in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Conclusion 

IFRS 18 can be managed in SAP S/4HANA using tools that already exist, such as Financial Statement Version, Global Hierarchy, Functional Area, Custom Dimensions, and Extension Ledgers. The important thing is to start early. Companies that update their general ledger structure or classify transactions properly in 2026 will find it much easier to create comparable profit and loss statements in 2027. 

If companies start late, they can still meet requirements by using an Extension Ledger. However, this method needs careful planning and proper coordination with auditors to make sure all adjustment entries are correct.

entry.title: [S/4HANA Cloud] Regarding the use of BOM in order-based design-to-order production (ETO)
entry.content:
Final Products: Produced based on make-to-order production.

Semi-finished Products: Produced on a make-to-stock basis. WBS elements are linked and managed using WBS inventory and cost.

We want to incorporate the dependent requirements from the final product into the WBS element requirements, so the final product policy group is set to E2 (Made-to-Order Design Production).

However, we've found that the BOM (Bill of Materials) is not used with E2.

Is there a way to use the BOM with the E2 policy group, or an alternative that satisfies the above requirements?

entry.title: Re: Setting up tolerance check in EWM
entry.content: very good, thanks.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to export data as excel but with subto...
entry.content:
Check this answer at How to download report to excel with "group by" information in SAP public cloud version.

  • Could you consider using Customer Influence and Adoption
